title: Trump accuses Iran of 'total violation' of ceasefire, threatens to destroy 'every power plant, every bridge'
snippet: Trump posted on Truth Social Sunday morning accusing Iran of a 'total violation' of the ceasefire and threatening to 'knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran' unless they accept a deal.
tag_reason: Trump's 'total violation' accusation and specific infrastructure destruction threats (power plants, bridges) are new escalatory rhetoric
